form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second of 10 at Kembla Grange F&M Bm78 November 22 over 1200m, soft track; a head behind Weeping Woman carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 2 len Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw September 11 over 1100m slow track defeating Hellabella with 58kg at $1.50. Talented mare who can sprint well fresh with the claim.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 5th of 12 at Albury Flat Knacker 94 on March 20 over 900m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sparring carrying 59.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at this track Bm78 on September 27 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Monte Supreme with 55.5kg at $31. Tested from the gate.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 on February 20 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Kimberley Secrets with 59.5kg at $26. Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Warwick Farm 5yo+ Bm72 on March 4 over 1200m, slow going 0.9 len behind Ready To Shine with 59.5kg at $9.50. Not far off a win and is a definite winning hope.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track Midway 5yo+ Bm72 on March 14 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Audrey's Lane carrying 57.5kg at $10. The race before that 4th of 12 at Randwick Midway Bm72 on February 14 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Mal Coupe carrying 58kg at $9.50. Close to a win. Can feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 2nd in a small field at this track Bm72 on February 25 over 1100m, 0.9 len behind Banjora with 57kg at $51. Big chance third-up.

form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 7 at Warwick Farm Bm72 on March 4 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Wootton Lass with 54kg at $16. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head at Nowra Bm74 February 22 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Monte Cruise carrying 60kg at $3.80. Not keen on his chances.
